title: Style Consultation
description: Discover your signature style with our premium collection

fields.label: Style Notes
fields.placeholder: Tell us about your style goals, upcoming events, or any specific pieces you're looking for...

options.label: Receive exclusive previews and member-only offers

customCss: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap');:root{--aur-black:#0a0a0a;--aur-charcoal:#1a1a1a;--aur-dark:#2d2d2d;--aur-gray:#6b6b6b;--aur-light-gray:#b0b0b0;--aur-border:#e5dfd5;--aur-cream:#faf7f2;--aur-ivory:#f5f0e8;--aur-white:#ffffff;--aur-gold:#b8924a;--aur-gold-dk:#9a7838;--aur-shadow:0 2px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.08);--aur-radius:2px}*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}.mfp.aur-form{font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;background:var(--aur-cream);min-height:100vh;padding:32px 20px;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-start}.aur-card{max-width:100%;width:100%;background:var(--aur-white);border:1px solid var(--aur-border);box-shadow:var(--aur-shadow)}.aur-accent-bar{height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--aur-black) 0%,var(--aur-gold) 50%,var(--aur-black) 100%)}.aur-header{padding:28px 36px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--aur-border);text-align:center}.aur-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px}.aur-logo{width:44px;height:44px;flex-shrink:0}.aur-brand-text{text-align:left}.aur-brand-name{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--aur-black);letter-spacing:.16em;line-height:1}.aur-brand-tagline{font-size:9px;font-weight:500;color:var(--aur-gold);letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:3px}.aur-header-divider{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px}.aur-divider-line{flex:0 0 70px;height:1px;background:var(--aur-border)}.aur-divider-diamond{width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--aur-gold);transform:rotate(45deg)}.aur-body{padding:30px 36px 36px}.aur-intro{text-align:center;margin-bottom:30px}.aur-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:400;color:var(--aur-black);margin:0 0 10px}.aur-description{font-size:13px;color:var(--aur-gray);margin:0;line-height:1.6;letter-spacing:.02em}.aur-section{margin-bottom:28px}.aur-section-label{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--aur-black);margin-bottom:18px;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--aur-border)}.aur-section-icon{width:16px;height:16px;color:var(--aur-gold);flex-shrink:0}.aur-fields{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}.aur-collection-section{margin:0 -36px 28px;padding:24px 36px;background:var(--aur-ivory);border-top:1px solid var(--aur-border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--aur-border)}.aur-filter-bar{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:18px;flex-wrap:wrap}.aur-filter-btn{padding:7px 18px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;border:1px solid var(--aur-border);background:var(--aur-white);color:var(--aur-dark);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;border-radius:var(--aur-radius)}.aur-filter-btn:hover{border-color:var(--aur-black);color:var(--aur-black)}.aur-filter-btn.active{background:var(--aur-black);color:var(--aur-white);border-color:var(--aur-black)}.aur-products-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:14px}.aur-product-card{background:var(--aur-white);border:1px solid var(--aur-border);position:relative;cursor:pointer;transition:box-shadow .2s,transform .2s}.aur-product-card:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.1);transform:translateY(-2px)}.aur-product-image{aspect-ratio:1/1;overflow:hidden;background:var(--aur-ivory)}.aur-product-image img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .4s ease}.aur-product-card:hover .aur-product-image img{transform:scale(1.05)}.aur-product-badge{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 10px;background:var(--aur-black);color:var(--aur-white)}.aur-product-info{padding:12px 14px}.aur-product-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--aur-black);margin-bottom:3px}.aur-product-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--aur-gray);margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.4}.aur-product-price{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--aur-gold-dk)}.aur-newsletter{margin-bottom:18px;padding:14px;background:var(--aur-ivory);border:1px solid var(--aur-border)}.aur-actions{margin-bottom:12px}.aur-submit{width:100%;padding:15px 32px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;background:var(--aur-black);color:var(--aur-white);border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s,letter-spacing .2s}.aur-submit:hover{background:var(--aur-charcoal);letter-spacing:.2em}.aur-footer-note{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:var(--aur-gray);letter-spacing:.04em}.mfp.aur-form .mf-field-label,.mfp.aur-form .mf-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--aur-black);margin-bottom:7px;display:block}.mfp.aur-form .mf-input,.mfp.aur-form .mf-select,.mfp.aur-form .mf-textarea{border:1px solid var(--aur-border);border-radius:var(--aur-radius);background:var(--aur-ivory);font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--aur-dark);padding:11px 14px;width:100%;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s}.mfp.aur-form .mf-input:focus,.mfp.aur-form .mf-select:focus,.mfp.aur-form .mf-textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--aur-black);background:var(--aur-white)}.mfp.aur-form .mf-input::placeholder,.mfp.aur-form .mf-textarea::placeholder{color:var(--aur-light-gray)}.mfp.aur-form .mf-field-group{margin-bottom:0}.mfp.aur-form .mf-fields-container{gap:14px}.mfp.aur-form .mf-row{gap:14px}.mfp.aur-form .mf-option-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.mfp.aur-form .mf-option-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}.mfp.aur-form .mf-required{color:var(--aur-gold)}.mfp.aur-form .mf-textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:100px}.aur-intro,.aur-section:not(.aur-collection-section),.aur-newsletter,.aur-actions,.aur-footer-note{max-width:720px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}@media(min-width:640px){.aur-products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px}}@media(min-width:960px){.aur-products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:18px}}@media(min-width:1280px){.aur-products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr)}}@media(min-width:1600px){.aur-products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:20px}}@media(max-width:600px){.mfp.aur-form{padding:0}.aur-card{border-left:none;border-right:none}.aur-header{padding:20px}.aur-body{padding:20px}.aur-collection-section{margin:0 -20px 24px;padding:20px}.aur-products-grid{gap:10px}.mfp.aur-form .mf-row{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;gap:0!important}.mfp.aur-form .mf-row-column{width:100%!important;min-width:0!important}.aur-title{font-size:22px}.aur-intro{margin-bottom:22px}}@media(max-width:400px){.aur-products-grid{gap:8px}.aur-product-info{padding:10px 12px}.aur-product-name{font-size:12px}.aur-product-desc{font-size:10px}.aur-product-price{font-size:12px}.aur-header,.aur-body{padding:16px}.aur-collection-section{margin:0 -16px 20px;padding:16px}}

var(--aur-border)}.aur-filter-bar{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:18px;flex-wrap:wrap}.aur-filter-btn{padding:7px 18px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;border:1px solid var(--aur-border);background:var(--aur-white);color:var(--aur-dark);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;border-radius:var(--aur-radius)}.aur-filter-btn:hover{border-color:var(--aur-black);color:var(--aur-black)}.aur-filter-btn.active{background:var(--aur-black);color:var(--aur-white);border-color:var(--aur-black)}.aur-products-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:14px}.aur-product-card{background:var(--aur-white);border:1px solid var(--aur-border);position:relative;cursor:pointer;transition:box-shadow .2s,transform .2s}.aur-product-card:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.1);transform:translateY(-2px)}.aur-product-image{aspect-ratio:1/1;overflow:hidden;background:var(--aur-ivory)}.aur-product-image img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .4s ease}.aur-product-card:hover .aur-product-image img{transform:scale(1.05)}.aur-product-badge{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;font-size:9px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 10px;background:var(--aur-black);color:var(--aur-white)}.aur-product-info{padding:12px 14px}.aur-product-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--aur-black);margin-bottom:3px}.aur-product-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--aur-gray);margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.4}.aur-product-price{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--aur-gold-dk)}.aur-newsletter{margin-bottom:18px;padding:14px;background:var(--aur-ivory);border:1px solid var(--aur-border)}.aur-actions{margin-bottom:12px}.aur-submit{width:100%;padding:15px 32px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;background:var(--aur-black);color:var(--aur-white);border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s,letter-spacing .2s}.aur-submit:hover{background:var(--aur-charcoal);letter-spacing:.2em}.aur-footer-note{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:var(--aur-gray);letter-spacing:.04em}.mfp.aur-form .mf-field-label,.mfp.aur-form .mf-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--aur-black);margin-bottom:7px;display:block}.mfp.aur-form .mf-input,.mfp.aur-form .mf-select,.mfp.aur-form .mf-textarea{border:1px solid var(--aur-border);border-radius:var(--aur-radius);background:var(--aur-ivory);font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--aur-dark);padding:11px 14px;width:100%;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s}.mfp.aur-form .mf-input:focus,.mfp.aur-form .mf-select:focus,.mfp.aur-form .mf-textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--aur-black);background:var(--aur-white)}.mfp.aur-form .mf-input::placeholder,.mfp.aur-form .mf-textarea::placeholder{color:var(--aur-light-gray)}.mfp.aur-form .mf-field-group{margin-bottom:0}.mfp.aur-form .mf-fields-container{gap:14px}.mfp.aur-form .mf-row{gap:14px}.mfp.aur-form .mf-option-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}.mfp.aur-form .mf-option-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}.mfp.aur-form .mf-required{color:var(--aur-gold)}.mfp.aur-form .mf-textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:100px}.aur-intro,.aur-section:not(.aur-collection-section),.aur-newsletter,.aur-actions,.aur-footer-note{max-width:720px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}@media(min-width:640px){.aur-products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px}}@media(min-width:960px){.aur-products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:18px}}@media(min-width:1280px){.aur-products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr)}}@media(min-width:1600px){.aur-products-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:20px}}@media(max-width:600px){.mfp.aur-form{padding:0}.aur-card{border-left:none;border-right:none}.aur-header{padding:20px}.aur-body{padding:20px}.aur-collection-section{margin:0 -20px 24px;padding:20px}.aur-products-grid{gap:10px}.mfp.aur-form .mf-row{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;gap:0!important}.mfp.aur-form .mf-row-column{width:100%!important;min-width:0!important}.aur-title{font-size:22px}.aur-intro{margin-bottom:22px}}@media(max-width:400px){.aur-products-grid{gap:8px}.aur-product-info{padding:10px 12px}.aur-product-name{font-size:12px}.aur-product-desc{font-size:10px}.aur-product-price{font-size:12px}.aur-header,.aur-body{padding:16px}.aur-collection-section{margin:0 -16px 20px;padding:16px}}
